body_html:
ask for a price with hard top and air con..

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Met with Tom From Midnight, he is producing a 37foot
long, 12 foot beam
Midnight Express. Running 3, 275hp Verados he
guarantees 60MPH and has achieved
63MPH on his center console version, With Bow
thruster.
The current midnight Express at LSJ is 37feet, with
9.5 foot beam. This
additional wide body is a tremendous increase in
passenger comfort.
picture below is the shell that Tom said any hardtop
or pilot house may be
added.
